name: Horizontal Rectangular High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer
description: A CSSD-focused rectangular steam sterilizer for institutions that need repeatable cycles, load documentation, and enquiry-based configuration support.

name: Horizontal Cylindrical High-Pressure Steam Sterilizer
description: A cylindrical horizontal autoclave for hospitals and laboratories that need dependable pressure-steam sterilization with automated cycle control and domestic service support.

name: Horizontal High-Speed Steam Sterilizer
description: A high-speed steam sterilizer for OT and sterile-processing teams that need faster instrument turnaround with controlled automation, cycle visibility, and service accountability.

name: Fully Automatic Vertical Autoclave
description: A compact vertical autoclave for labs, clinics, and smaller departments that need automated sterilization controls in a space-conscious footprint.

name: Bowl & Utensil Sterilizer
description: A stainless-steel sterilizer for OT, ward, and patient-care utensil workflows where infection-control support is needed outside the main CSSD.

name: Fully Automatic Hot & Cold Water Pressure Sterilizer
description: A fully automatic hot and cold water pressure sterilizer for departments that need controlled sterile-water handling, safety fittings, and serviceable stainless construction.
